instructions: Review the current core domain models. We need to ensure that the upcoming Pydantic provider can handle these specific structures, including Enums and nested lists, when generating JSON schemas.
anti_patterns: Do not alter core.py schemas in this phase.
Avoid proposing changes that break Pydantic V2 compatibility.

instructions: Implement the PydanticV2Provider in src/jitsu/providers/pydantic.py. The provider must use importlib to dynamically load the class defined in target_identifier and return a formatted Markdown block containing its model_json_schema().
anti_patterns: Do not use raw string parsing for class names; use formal import resolution.
Do not fail the entire compilation if an optional pydantic_v2 target fails to resolve.
